ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "custid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "created" TEXT /* Date the customer account was created */,
  "retained" INTEGER /* Retention status of the customer (0 = inactive, 1 = active) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Customer's email address */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Customer's phone number */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Customer's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Customer's gender */,
  "preferred_communication_channel" TEXT /* Customer's preferred communication channel */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Customer's loyalty points */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("custid")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "orderid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "custid" TEXT /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "firstorder" TEXT /* Date of the first order */,
  "lastorder" TEXT /* Date of the last order */,
  "avgorder" REAL /* Average order value */,
  "ordfreq" REAL /* Order frequency */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "paymentmethodid" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used */,
  "shippingoptionid" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping option used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("orderid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_custid FOREIGN KEY ("custid") REFERENCES customers ("custid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_paymentmethodid FOREIGN KEY ("paymentmethodid") REFERENCES payment_methods ("paymentmethodid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shippingoptionid FOREIGN KEY ("shippingoptionid") REFERENCES shipping_options ("shippingoptionid")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "orderitemid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "orderid" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the item belongs to */,
  "productid" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "item_price" REAL /* Price of the item */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("orderitemid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_orderid FOREIGN KEY ("orderid") REFERENCES orders ("orderid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_productid FOREIGN KEY ("productid") REFERENCES products ("productid")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "productid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "categoryid" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("productid")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "paymentmethodid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Name of the payment method (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paymentmethodid")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_options" (
  "shippingoptionid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping option */,
  "shipping_option" TEXT /* Name of the shipping option (e.g., ground, air) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shipping option */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the shipping option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shippingoptionid")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_shipments" (
  "ordershipmentid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order shipment */,
  "orderid" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the shipment belongs to */,
  "shippingoptionid" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping option used */,
  "shipdate" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the shipment (e.g., shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ordershipmentid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_shipments_orderid FOREIGN KEY ("orderid") REFERENCES orders ("orderid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_shipments_shippingoptionid FOREIGN KEY ("shippingoptionid") REFERENCES shipping_options ("shippingoptionid")
)

CREATE TABLE "email_campaigns" (
  "emailcampaignid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each email campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the email campaign */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject line of the email */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the email */,
  "send_date" TEXT /* Date the email was sent */,
  "target_segment" TEXT /* Target customer segment for the campaign */,
  "open_rate" REAL /* Open rate of the email campaign */,
  "click_rate" REAL /* Click-through rate of the email campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emailcampaignid")
)

CREATE TABLE "email_openrates" (
  "emailopenrateid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each email open rate */,
  "emailcampaignid" INTEGER /* ID of the email campaign that the open rate belongs to */,
  "openrate" REAL /* Open rate of the email campaign */,
  "campaign_send_date" TEXT /* Date the campaign was sent */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emailopenrateid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_openrates_emailcampaignid FOREIGN KEY ("emailcampaignid") REFERENCES email_campaigns ("emailcampaignid")
)

CREATE TABLE "email_clickrates" (
  "emailclickrateid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each email click-through rate */,
  "emailcampaignid" INTEGER /* ID of the email campaign that the click-through rate belongs to */,
  "clickrate" REAL /* Click-through rate of the email campaign */,
  "campaign_send_date" TEXT /* Date the campaign was sent */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emailclickrateid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_clickrates_emailcampaignid FOREIGN KEY ("emailcampaignid") REFERENCES email_campaigns ("emailcampaignid")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segments" (
  "customersegmentid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer segment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the customer segment */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the segment was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customersegmentid")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segment_assignments" (
  "customersegmentassignmentid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer segment assignment */,
  "custid" TEXT /* ID of the customer that the assignment belongs to */,
  "customersegmentid" INTEGER /* ID of the customer segment that the customer is assigned to */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the customer was assigned to the segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customersegmentassignmentid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_segment_assignments_custid FOREIGN KEY ("custid") REFERENCES customers ("custid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_segment_assignments_customersegmentid FOREIGN KEY ("customersegmentid") REFERENCES customer_segments ("customersegmentid")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "cityid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province where the city is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cityid")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_location" (
  "customerlocationid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer location */,
  "custid" TEXT /* ID of the customer that the location belongs to */,
  "cityid" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the customer is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's address */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Customer's zip code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customerlocationid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_location_cityid FOREIGN KEY ("cityid") REFERENCES cities ("cityid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_location_custid FOREIGN KEY ("custid") REFERENCES customers ("custid")
)

CREATE TABLE "favorite_days" (
  "favoritedayid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite day */,
  "favoriteday" TEXT /* Name of the favorite day */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the favorite day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favoritedayid")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_favorite_days" (
  "customerfavoritedayid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer favorite day */,
  "custid" TEXT /* ID of the customer that the favorite day belongs to */,
  "favoritedayid" INTEGER /* ID of the favorite day */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the customer was assigned the favorite day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customerfavoritedayid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_favorite_days_custid FOREIGN KEY ("custid") REFERENCES customers ("custid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_favorite_days_favoritedayid FOREIGN KEY ("favoritedayid") REFERENCES favorite_days ("favoritedayid")
)

CREATE TABLE "paperless" (
  "paperlessid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each paperless option */,
  "paperless" INTEGER /* Paperless option (0 = no, 1 = yes) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the paperless option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paperlessid")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_paperless" (
  "customerpaperlessid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer paperless option */,
  "custid" TEXT /* ID of the customer that the paperless option belongs to */,
  "paperlessid" INTEGER /* ID of the paperless option */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the customer was assigned the paperless option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customerpaperlessid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_paperless_paperlessid FOREIGN KEY ("paperlessid") REFERENCES paperless ("paperlessid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_paperless_custid FOREIGN KEY ("custid") REFERENCES customers ("custid")
)
